case_title: MARINA GOUCHANSKAIR-QUEZADA VS. AUTORETURN COMMERCIAL SOLUTIONS, LLC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN COMMERCIAL SOLUTIONS, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-03-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN COMMERCIAL SOLUTIONS, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
